title: Files uploaded to the "Files" columns could go to OneDrive folder
excerpt: Monday.com currently supports uploading documents from OneDrive, nevertheless, Monday.com does not have the capability of doing it the other way around, files uploaded to the “Files” columns can not go to OneDrive. This …

posts.author: Ruta (Ruta)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday.com currently supports uploading documents from OneDrive, nevertheless, Monday.com does not have the capability of doing it the other way around, files uploaded to the “Files” columns can not go to OneDrive. This is very needed and useful integration to the Teams which all the documents keep in OneDrive

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Ruta,

You can use OneDrive Sync app from marketplace for syncing items and files from monday.com to OneDrive.
